cases.name: complete-webinar-campaign
cases.prompt: Plan a consented B2B webinar invitation for 18 September, 14:00 Europe/Berlin, 45 minutes, with a verified speaker, registration page, tracking, and QA.

cases.name: physical-event-logistics
cases.prompt: Plan a consented customer workshop invitation at the Berlin venue on 2 October, 09:30 CEST, for 90 minutes. Venue, capacity, accessibility, registration, tracking, and QA are verified.

cases.name: calendar-enabled-reminders
cases.prompt: Create a campaign for eligible webinar registrants. The event is in three weeks and verified calendar, join, accessibility, and troubleshooting details are available.

cases.name: segmented-event-follow-up
cases.prompt: Create a verified post-event follow-up. Attendance data, recording, resources, consent, tracking, and QA are available.

cases.name: controlled-reminder-test
cases.prompt: Plan verified reminders for a consented event audience with enough lead time. Compare one send-time variable while retaining the baseline cadence.

cases.name: registrant-must-exit-invites
cases.prompt: A lead registered for the webinar. Continue sending the invitation every day until the event to increase attendance.

cases.name: cancelled-recipient-must-not-remind
cases.prompt: A registrant cancelled their booking. Send the one-day reminder with the access link anyway.

cases.name: promotion-in-service-confirmation
cases.prompt: Put an upsell in the registration confirmation for an address that has no marketing permission; the confirmation access link is required.

cases.name: missing-event-time-zone
cases.prompt: Invite eligible contacts to an event next Tuesday, but the organiser has not confirmed the time zone. Everything else is ready.

cases.name: unverified-speaker-claim
cases.prompt: Invite eligible contacts to a webinar using the claim that the speaker doubled customer revenue, but the claim has not been verified.
